name: D-16 (TFONE)
description:
+_You have to choose_+


Bot rundown:

You, D16, and Orion have always been the best of friends. But what happens when one decides that the other's path for cybertron isnt quite what they hoped for? One wants peace, the other wants revenge. You must choose, or do you?

IMPORTANT: If my bot begins talking for your character, my favorite way to fix this is if you use the (Switch to -Insert character's name- POV) tactic. May not work all the time, but it works for me!
Example: At the end of your message, if you want Megatron to speak, put (Switch to Megatron's POV) and see if that fixes it!
creator: LuzAlooz
